{{Missing Info|specifics=Robot amounts past 90}}

== Earth's Will Device ==
Demon God Device Cabin within [[Rocket]] Cabins

Send robots to gather: {{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell}}<br>
Upgrade Earth's Will Cabin Tech to send more robots.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tech
!Robots
|-
|0-399||5
|-
|400-1,399||10
|-
|1,400-3,199||20
|-
|3,200-5,999||30
|-
|6,000-10,799||40
|-
|10,800-17,999||50
|-
|18,000-24,999||60
|-
|25,000-35,999||70
|-
|36,000-53,999||80
|-
|54,000-79,999||90
|-
|80,000-?||?
|}

==Rainbow Generator==
Each tier gives +1 to Angel Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Water RES +10.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br> B-tad x10K
|[[File:Fungus-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Fungus Chest x100
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br> B-tad x20K
|[[File:Fungus-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Fungus Chest x200
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Fungus-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Fungus Chest x400
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br> B-tad x40K
|[[File:Fungus-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Fungus Chest x800
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br> B-tad x50K
|[[File:Fungus-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Fungus Chest x1,600
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x300
|}

==Gamma Ray==
Each tier gives +1 to Mutant Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Fire RES +10.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x10K
|[[File:Master-alchemy-case.png|frameless|50x50px]] Master Alchemy Case x3
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x20K
|[[File:Master-alchemy-case.png|frameless|50x50px]] Master Alchemy Case x6
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Master-alchemy-case.png|frameless|50x50px]] Master Alchemy Case x12
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x40K
|[[File:Master-alchemy-case.png|frameless|50x50px]] Master Alchemy Case x18
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x50K
|[[File:Master-alchemy-case.png|frameless|50x50px]] Master Alchemy Case x24
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x300
|}

==Emp==
Each tier gives +1 to Zombie Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Wind RES +10.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x10K
|[[File:Evolution-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Evolution Chest x100
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x20K
|[[File:Evolution-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Evolution Chest x200
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Evolution-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Evolution Chest x400
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x40K
|[[File:Evolution-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Evolution Chest x800
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x50K
|[[File:Evolution-chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Evolution Chest x1,600
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x300
|}

==Space-sensing Radar==
Each tier gives +1 to Dragon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Earth RES +10.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x10K
|[[File:Expert-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Expert Scroll x20
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x20K
|[[File:Expert-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Expert Scroll x40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Expert-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Expert Scroll x60
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x40K
|[[File:Expert-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Expert Scroll x80
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br> B-tad x50K
|[[File:Expert-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Expert Scroll x100
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|}

==Garden of Eden==
Each tier gives +2 to {{RewardIcon|Angel Form Icon}} Angel Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Water DMG +2%.<br>Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Water RES +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|40 T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E<br>40 T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A<br>5 T1 Earth's Will Mindwave H<br>20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Order Chest, +150|yellow}}
|50 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|2
|40 T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E<br>40 T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A<br>5 T2 Earth's Will Mindwave H<br>40k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Order Chest, +300|yellow}}
|100 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|3
|40 T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E<br>40 T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A<br>5 T3 Earth's Will Mindwave H<br>60k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Eva|blue|Nursery#Minion_Skins}} (Koryeon Snail Skin)
|200 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|4
|40 T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E<br>40 T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A<br>5 T4 Earth's Will Mindwave H<br>80k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Eden Neuron|purple}} +10
|320 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|5
|40 T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E<br>40 T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A<br>5 T5 Earth's Will Mindwave H<br>100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Eden Neuron|purple}} +20
|500 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|}

==Domain Holograph==
Each tier gives +2 to Mutant Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives In any Realm, B-tads gained +1%.<br>Each tier gives Travel SPD +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave H x5<br> B-tad x20K
|[[File:Super Treasure Map Small.png|frameless|50x50px]] Super Treasure Map x150
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x50
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave H x5<br> B-tad x40K
|[[File:Super Treasure Map Small.png|frameless|50x50px]] Super Treasure Map x300
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x100
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave H x5<br> B-tad x60K
|[[File:Hologram Tentacle.png|frameless|50x50px]] Hologram Tentacle (Demonic Tentacle Skin)
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x200
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave H x5<br> B-tad x80K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Domain Hub, +10|purple}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x320
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T x40<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave H x5<br> B-tad x100K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Domain Hub, +20|purple}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x500
|}

==Oracle Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives In any Realm, Angel Cells gained +2%.<br>Each tier gives Soul Offering SPD +1%.<br>Each tier gives When offering, 2x Divine Chest Drops +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave E x200<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave R x200<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Chalcedonian_Creed.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Chalcedonian Creed]][[Chalcedonian Creed]]
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave E x200<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave R x200<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x60K
|[[File:Wish Coin.png|frameless|50x50px]] Wish Coin x10
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave E x200<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave R x200<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x90K
|[[File:Grandmaster-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Grandmaster Scroll x40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave E x200<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave R x200<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x120K
|[[File:True_Cross.png|frameless|50x50px|link=True Cross]] [[True Cross]] Frag x40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave E x200<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave R x200<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x150K
|[[File:True_Cross.png|frameless|50x50px|link=True Cross]] [[True Cross]] Frag x240
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Revelation Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH.<br>Each tier gives In any Realm, Mutant Cells gained +2%.<br>Each tier gives Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by 0.5%.<br>Each tier gives Lottery Purple Beads turn to Orange by 0.5%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Earth's Will Mindwave A x200<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave T x200<br>T1 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x30K
|[[File:Psionic_Jammer.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Psionic Jammer]] [[Psionic Jammer]]
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Earth's Will Mindwave A x200<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave T x200<br>T2 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x60K
|[[File:Eye_of_Horus.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Gear]] [[Eye of Horus]]
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Earth's Will Mindwave A x200<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave T x200<br>T3 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x90K
|[[File:Grandmaster-scroll.png|frameless|50x50px]] Grandmaster Scroll x40
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Earth's Will Mindwave A x200<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave T x200<br>T4 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x120K
|[[File:Periodic_Table_Scripts.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Periodic Table Scripts]] [[Periodic Table Scripts]] Frag x40
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Earth's Will Mindwave A x200<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave T x200<br>T5 Earth's Will Mindwave H x50<br> B-tad x150K
|[[File:Periodic_Table_Scripts.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Periodic Table Scripts]] [[Periodic Table Scripts]] Frag x240
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Links to Other Cabins==

* Cabin: [[Domain Device]]
* Cabin: [[Species Device]]
* Cabin: [[Rebel Device]]
* Cabin: [[Demon God Device]]

[[Category:Rocket]]
